trigger.reason: OpenAI launched ChatGPT for personal finance with bank account integration — a new vertical-targeted product release from a top-tier lab with high market-moving potential across fintech, personal finance software, and wealth-management SaaS.

primary_event.headline: OpenAI launches ChatGPT for personal finance, will let you connect bank accounts
primary_event.summary: OpenAI has released a dedicated personal finance version of ChatGPT that allows users to connect their bank accounts and view a dashboard showing portfolio performance, spending, subscriptions, and upcoming payments. This represents a direct entry into the personal finance software vertical and signals OpenAI's expansion into wealth-management and financial advisory use cases.

secondary_events.headline: OpenAI says Codex is coming to your phone
